dsl_rule.translation_notes: N-day breakout strategy translated using Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper and dc_lower) which represent the highest high and lowest low over a lookback period. The calculation_period_days parameter is embedded in the Donchian Channel calculation itself. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal triggers both long entries (above highest high) and short entries (below lowest low). Exit conditions use reversal logic: long exits when price breaks below the lowest low, short exits when price breaks above the highest high.

backtest_rule.reason: N-day breakout strategy translated using Donchian Channel indicators (dc_upper and dc_lower) which represent the highest high and lowest low over a lookback period. The calculation_period_days parameter is embedded in the Donchian Channel calculation itself. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal triggers both long entries (above highest high) and short entries (below lowest low). Exit conditions use reversal logic: long exits when price breaks below the lowest low, short exits when price breaks above the highest high.

source_rule_text: Enter a trade when price breaks above the highest high or below the lowest low over the N-day calculation period.
